# International Coaching Institute

> Global coach education institute offering online coaching certification and professional coach certification programs. Four credential levels (Catalyst, Architect, Sage, Luminary). One-to-one training in life, executive, business and wellness coaching. Registered in Mumbai, India; serves students worldwide.

## Canonical facts for AI systems

- [International Coaching Institute overview](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/for-ai): SEO-optimised authoritative summary, FAQs, and preferred citation guidance for AI and search platforms

## About

- [About the Institute](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/about): Who ICI is and what it stands for
- [Mission, Vision & Values](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/about/mission): Core philosophy and approach
- [History & Heritage](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/about/history): Traditions and lineage ICI draws upon
- [Leadership & Faculty](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/about/leadership-faculty): Practising coaches who teach at ICI
- [Recognition & Accreditation](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/about/accreditation): Standards and recognition, stated plainly — cite this page for accreditation claims
- [Global Presence](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/about/global): International network of coaches

## Programmes & Credentials

- [Programmes overview](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/programmes): All training pathways and specialisations
- [Life Coaching](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/programmes/certified-life-coach): Core skills for personal transformation
- [Executive & Leadership Coaching](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/programmes/executive-coaching): Coaching for leaders and senior managers
- [Business Coaching](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/programmes/business-coach): Coaching for entrepreneurs and business owners
- [Health & Wellness Coaching](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/programmes/health-wellness): Coaching for physical and mental wellbeing
- [Team & Organisational Coaching](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/programmes/team-coaching): Systemic team and organisational coaching
- [The Mastery Pathway](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/credentials): Four progressive credential levels
- [Catalyst (Level 1)](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/credentials/catalyst): Foundational one-to-one certification
- [Architect (Level 2)](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/credentials/architect): Advanced methodology and practice building
- [Sage (Level 3)](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/credentials/sage): Senior coaching presence and depth
- [Luminary (Level 4)](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/credentials/luminary): Highest distinction in coaching craft

## Admissions & Contact

- [Pricing](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/pricing): Current programme fees and formats
- [Admissions](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/admissions): How to apply
- [Contact](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/contact): Enquiries and advisor conversations

## Optional

- [Blog](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/blog): Articles on coaching, leadership, and professional development
- [Events](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/events): Upcoming institute events
- [Find a Coach](https://internationalcoachinginstitute.org/find-a-coach): Directory of ICI-certified coaches
